top_signals.title: Federal Reserve drops bias for rate cuts as Kevin Warsh era begins
top_signals.summary: Donald Trump’s war in Iran has sent inflation to nearly double the central bank’s target
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Fed projections call for a rate hike in 2026, but Chairman Warsh likely abstained
top_signals.summary: The median projection called for the federal funds rate to end 2026 at 3.8%, a quarter percentage point above the current target range.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Gold Falls as Fed Decision Boosts Trader Bets on 2026 Rate Hike
top_signals.summary: Gold fell after Federal Reserve officials left interest rates unchanged while signaling the possibility of higher rates later this year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: US Yields Jump as Fed Dot Plot Boosts Trader Bets on a 2026 Rate Hike
top_signals.summary: US Treasury yields leaped as Federal Reserve officials signaled they expect an interest-rate hike in the coming months, pushing traders to fully price in higher borrowing costs in 2026.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve holds rates with short statement and hawkish projections
top_signals.summary: Kevin Warsh has eliminated explicit forward guidance, but his colleagues project that at least one rate rise is needed
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bass Pro Shops Is Buying a Luxury Florida Keys Fishing Lodge
top_signals.summary: Outdoor retailer Bass Pro Shops is buying a historic fishing lodge in the Florida Keys, adding another luxury hotel to its growing portfolio.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Stellantis Is in Talks With Two Possible Partners for Maserati
top_signals.summary: Stellantis NV Chief Executive Officer Antonio Filosa said the company is in talks with two potential partners for Maserati, which will have implications for the plants producing the ailing luxury’s brand’s cars.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.summary: EU struggles to find both unity and urgency in China crisis talks  Financial Times
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.summary: Comex Gold Settles 0.07% Higher at $4330.90  WSJ
